title: Want to learn how to think like a monday.com expert?

posts.author: norawa (Nora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feel like you and your team could be getting more out of monday.com workflows? We’ve got an interactive webinar to help you achieve just that!

What: Think like a monday.com expert
When: January 14, 12:00 pm EST | 9:00 am EST

Save my spot

Here’s what you’ll learn:

  • Our in-house methodology for building goal-driven workflows
  • Make the most of monday.com’s advanced features
  • How our certification program gives you the tools to make impact

Think of it as your roadmap to turning good workflows into great ones.

See you there!
